raider_1: §fA presence that can reclaim the courage of old,
raider_3: §fPerhaps you may temporarily take back some courage...
text_1: §eA star has fallen... Can it regain its former brilliance? Fighting with itself in delusion...
text_2: §eThis seems to be a place for me to rest and find myself... Maybe I can even trade with the authors?
text_3: §eThe Tide Star is in place! Now the lava no longer hinders your advance.
text_4: §eThe Flame Star is in place! Now you can burn away the twisted thorns upon those monsters.
text_5: §4Warning: Do not proceed before obtaining the Flame Star!
text_6: §eThe Void Star is in place! Now you can use enchanting table to upgrade yourself. Remember to find bookshelves!
text_7: §eThe Thorn Star is in place! Now you can shatter the mighty shields of the upper monsters.
text_8: §4Warning: Do not proceed before obtaining the Thorn Star!
text_9: §eThe Morning Star is in place! Now you can see through the blinding darkness brought by the twisted monsters.
text_10: §4Warning: Do not proceed before obtaining the Thorn Star and the Morning Star!
text_11: §eThe Soul Star is in place! The final ascent draws near...
text_12: §eOnce you see the dark clearly, it is no longer an abyss, only the mist before dawn. As long as a glimmer remains, falling is not an end.
text_13: §eWhen the rift is stitched together, the road you lost will quietly grow back beneath your feet.
text_14: §eWhen you reclaim your direction, the stars are no longer a distance above you; they become the place your steps are meant to reach.
text_15: §eWhen you reach out once more, the stars will answer. you rose to shine again, and become the road that leads you to the stars.
text_16: §eTrue Reaching for the Stars isn't standing beneath the sky and gazing up. It's after the falls, the crossings, the starting over — still choosing, again and again, to reach out for the stars that is yours before.
tide_5: §ea low point does not mean forever.
tide_6: §eIt only reminds you that moving forward
flame_1: §eSome paths do not welcome your passage;
flame_2: §ethey only try to drive you back.
void_3: §eYou begin to doubt whether you are
morning_6: §elike a signal placed in your hand.
soul_6: §ethe echoes that tell you to stop.
starcore_2: §eSeems to empower the ability to raid starcores...
hint_4: §eUpgrade successful! The cooldown of raiding starcores has been reduced.
spider: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: +1 Attack Range for 30 seconds.
creeper: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Taking damage triggers an AoE damage burst for 30 seconds (5s cooldown).
blaze: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Fire Resistance for 20 seconds.
witch: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: A random potion effect.
elite: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Killing any monster triggers a large AoE damage burst for 30 seconds.
miner: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Increased mining speed for 30 seconds.
bone: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Receive 16 arrows.
hoglin: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Increased Knockback Resistance for 30 seconds.
piglin: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Increased Attack Speed for 30 seconds.
parched: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Nearby monsters gain Slowness and Weakness for 30 seconds.
steve: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Thorns effect for 30 seconds.
black: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Become invisible to monsters for 15 seconds.
zomvillager: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Infinite Attack Speed for 20 seconds.
drowned: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: +2 Attack Range for 30 seconds.
husk: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Jump Boost III and the ability to step up 1-block-high terrain for 30 seconds.
bogged: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Attacks inflict Wither for 30 seconds.
vind: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: +3 Damage and a Speed boost for 30 seconds.
pillager: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: +4 Power for 30 seconds.
ravager: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Attacking a monster immobilizes it for 3 second, lasting 30 seconds.
shadow: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: Attacking triggers a AoE damage for 30 seconds. Immune to arrows for 15 seconds.
archer: Starcore seized! Gained temporary ability: +8 Power for 30 seconds.
t3: This map is a submission for Strawberry Jam #43, completed within a single week. It was built by me (FX) and CTTZB through tireless work, I poured in over 70 hours (main design, level design, datapacks),
t5: This is a CTM map. You can use most survival-mode tactics to complete it! Do not switch to Peaceful difficulty or go to the Nether. Collect the Monument items to finish the map!
t16: §eThis is where I once fell from the sky... I was lost, I hesitated, I struggled, but I found myself again. Now, the climb back to the stars begins anew.
t18: §eThis is a journey of reclaiming oneself. The protagonist fell from the sky, once utterly lost, but gradually found their former self again.
t19: §eThis is a journey back to the stars. No matter the circumstances, may everyone grow through their setbacks and return to the peak!
t20: §eThank you for playing! This map was completed within 7 days, with the two creators giving everything they had just to finish. We hope you enjoyed it! If you have any suggestions, feel free to let us know anytime!
t21: and CTTZB over 50(resourcepacks, details, lots of buildings), and together we finally finished it. Due to the tight schedule, the map may contain some imperfections; please forgive us. We hope you enjoy it!
t22: Render Distance >= 12. Note: If playing in multiplayer, make sure that everyone has the resource pack correctly installed!
t29: §e§lTeleport to home and unlock this teleportation
t34: §e§lNow, I feel I have the courage to return to the starry sky once again. Perhaps I should find a place where I can see the sky and climb all the way up ..
t35: §eI will no longer fear failure; it's merely a matter of climbing once more ..
t39: §lTeleport to the first room after eating...
t41: §fThe arrow shot out will have no gravity,
t43: §eThose glowing enemies... Perhaps attacking them can help me regain some of my abilities... (Attack the glowing enemies and seized their abilities without killing them in one hit)
t44: §eStarcore seized for the first time! The Starcore belongs to my former power... I can temporarily seized them. Currently, §lthe cooldown time for this ability is approximately 36 seconds...
t46: §ePerhaps I should knock on these jars. There should be quite a few things inside...
t51: §eIt seems that I can seized different abilities from different monsters...
t52: §eIt seems that the  Memory of Shard  are ineffective now...
t53: §eDid you know? Honey can clear the poison!
IntroArcher: §lThey dodge the light, forgetting that radiance pierces all gloom. Reclaim this sharpness to loose arrows that tear through the sky.
IntroBlack: §lThe heavy black armor and mask are but disguises of fear. When you no longer fear the dark, it can no longer perceive you.
IntroBlaze: §lThe flames sought to reduce you to ash, yet a true starcore is born from endless heat.
IntroBogged: §lThe mire and venom tried to corrupt your mind. Now, return this withering agony to them in full.
IntroBone: §lThe struggles at a dead end were once arrows of despair you loosed. Reclaim them now, and let every strike break the stalemate.
IntroCreeper: §lSuppressed agony always reaches a breaking point. Rather than be consumed by it, let this destructive fury pave your way.
IntroDrowned: §lDrowning in the abyss, you too once reached desperately upward. Turn this yearning into the power to strike from afar.
IntroElite: §lThe mightier the obstacle, the more deafening the echo of overcoming it. Let the shockwave of victory clear your path!
IntroHoglin: §lThe gales of your fall once knocked you back time and again. Regain your footing, and yield not a single step hereafter.
IntroHusk: §lThe desiccated remains still harbor the obsession to fly. Step upon old shackles, and feel the lightness of leaping toward the stars once more.
IntroMiner: §lSince you have hit rock bottom, shatter these thick stone walls with your own hands and carve out a path home.
IntroParched: §lThose fragile yet clamorous thoughts always seek to slow your steps. Strip them away, and let the abyss's exhaustion consume the horde.
IntroPiglin: §lGreed and haste once disrupted your rhythm. Tame this frenzy, and turn it into a relentless flurry of strikes.
IntroPillager: §lPillagers only fixate on their prey, while you must focus on the stars. Reclaim your focus, and let the will on your bowstring be unstoppable.
IntroRavager: §lColossal dread once froze you in your tracks. Now, grasp this imposing aura, and let surrounding nightmares halt under your glare.
IntroShadow: §lShadows always seek to retreat and hide. Cast aside cowardice, and let the dawn's shockwave shatter all hidden arrows and illusions.
IntroSpider: §lWebs of bewilderment once bound your limbs. Tear them apart, and extend your reach into the unknown corners.
IntroSteve: §lThat torn and shattered face was the self you least wished to confront. Embrace the scars of your past, and they shall reflect all incoming pain.
IntroVind: §lBlind rage brings only destruction. Regain your reason, and temper this reckless fury into desperate, decisive momentum.
IntroWitch: §lThe elixirs of fate once made you taste bitterness and the unknown. But to reforge your starlight, you must dare to roll these unpredictable dice.
IntroZomVillager: §lThese numb, wandering shells are souls that have lost their purpose. Awaken your dormant conviction, and unleash all your defiance in a single heartbeat!
t56: Using Tools: axiom, worldedit, DaBsu, Datapack Helper Plus, MCStacker. Special Thanks: Black_Tea_RGO
t57: Beta Testers: zhvsjia, LastStandMark, Makochishima, Mine_Hinata, TrueGuy1233, chu_touttz, MC_Wolf_Emperor, mushcat, AZ_tyrants
t59: The difficulty of this map is relatively low, and the default difficulty is set to Normal. If you find it too easy, you can change the difficulty at any time!
